title: ClinVarbitration arbitration algorithm
text: RClinVarbitration implements policy adapted Centre Population Genomics (CPG) ClinVarbitration 2.2.11, pinned commit 658b9f241eb2d43aa11214b153b19c1e18a16337. package identifies cpg-clinvarbitration-2.2.11. result alternative aggregation retained ClinVar submissions. NCBI’s official ClinVar aggregate, new submission ClinVar, clinical classification package. original VCV, RCV, SCV values remain available source relations every policy result can audited. two decision scopes: clinvar_policy_decisions groups one decision release, profile, VCV, allele, disease key. preferred XML-derived surface. clinvar_policy_allele_decisions groups release, profile, VCV, allele. closest XML-derived counterpart upstream’s allele-level output. separate rclinvarbitration_reproduce_clinvarbitration_parquet() function reads archived NCBI flat files differential validation upstream artifact. redundant normal XML-based use.

title: ClinVarbitration arbitration algorithm
text: SCV contributes submitted classification, review status, last assessment date, submitter, source order, assertion identity, SCV version. Disease-scoped arbitration also uses condition links attached SCV. Named policy profiles per-call submitter exclusions can remove evidence without deleting imported source tables.

title: ClinVarbitration arbitration algorithm
text: Matching case-insensitive XML-derived policy views. Submitted labels collapsed follows. Unknown rows ineligible enter denominator used . follows actual upstream collection path, discards unknown classifications arbitration.

title: ClinVarbitration arbitration algorithm
text: intended upstream qualified exclusion removes benign submission whose normalized submitter exactly illumina laboratory services; illumina. RClinVarbitration applies rule. pinned upstream commit, inner-loop continue actually remove row; package follows documented intent rather Python control-flow accident. package applies exclusions stored clinvar_policy_submitter_exclusions selected profile. row may apply every classification submitter one classification bin . Parquet export can add submitter_exclusions blinded run. Names trimmed matched case-insensitively; imported evidence unchanged.

title: ClinVarbitration arbitration algorithm
text: XML can expose versioned assertion structure absent upstream flat-file row model. XML policy views retain one row per assertion identity within decision group, preferring highest SCV version, stable assertion/source order. Disease-scoped deduplication includes disease key. flat-file differential reproducer intentionally add XML-step.

title: ClinVarbitration arbitration algorithm
text: eligible submission called modern either: date_last_evaluated 2016-01-01; normalized review status practice guideline reviewed expert panel. decision group contains least one modern submission, modern submissions retained. Otherwise, eligible submissions retained. missing date treated 1970-01-01. Strong reviews therefore never removed solely date old missing. views expose eligible retained counts whether filter applied.

title: ClinVarbitration arbitration algorithm
text: retained submission review status practice guideline reviewed expert panel, first submission source order supplies decision. order rule, vote rule always puts practice guideline ahead earlier expert-panel row. source ordinal retained explicitly behavior reproducible.

title: ClinVarbitration arbitration algorithm
text: strong review decisive, let: PP retained Pathogenic/Likely Pathogenic submissions; BB retained Benign submissions; UU retained VUS submissions; N=P+B+UN = P + B + U. first matching rule wins: P>0P>0 B>0B>0, accept larger class max⁡(P,B)≥0.60N\max(P,B) \ge 0.60N min⁡(P,B)≤0.20N\min(P,B) \le 0.20N. pathogenic benign remain 60/20 test fails, return Conflicting. U>0.60NU > 0.60N, return VUS. threshold strictly greater 60%. P>0P>0, return Pathogenic/Likely Pathogenic. B>0B>0, return Benign. Otherwise return VUS. VUS submissions part denominator. matters: six pathogenic, two benign, two VUS submissions pass rule (60% 20%), whereas six pathogenic three benign submissions fail minority threshold.

title: ClinVarbitration arbitration algorithm
text: Stars calculated retained evidence, pathogenic benign bins can contribute: practice guideline: 4 stars; otherwise expert-panel review: 3 stars; otherwise review status assertion criteria provided: 1 star; otherwise: 0 stars. maximum evidence level. strong VUS submission can determine classification strong-review rule, add stars, matching pinned upstream implementation.

title: ClinVarbitration arbitration algorithm
text: Disease-scoped decisions prefer source condition identifier. normalized key lower(database):identifier. pair available, fallback order ClinVar trait-set ID, normalized disease name, package’s condition entity ID. Canonical cross-references selected order: MedGen, MONDO, OMIM, Orphanet, MeSH, UMLS, OMIM phenotypic series. pragmatic grouping rules audited deviations NCBI’s aggregate semantics deviation differential audit.

title: ClinVarbitration arbitration algorithm
text: decision views retain policy/release/profile identity, source VCV allele IDs, classification, stars, eligible retained counts, distinct SCV submitter counts, per-bin counts, modern-filter status, latest retained assessment date. Disease decisions additionally retain disease identity name.

title: ClinVarbitration arbitration algorithm
text: March 2026 archived flat files executed pinned upstream 2.2.11 TSV code package’s flat reproducer. 4,125,389 keys, classifications, star values matched exactly. manifest records input, code, configuration, output digests. monthly XML flat products row-equivalent: 16 shared keys differ 361 keys occur one path. Every key classified audit source-row receipts. 377 total, 369 arise flat classification - XML current germline classification, one divergent three-row flat representation one XML SCV assertion, five use different source vocabularies, two child locations compound CYP2C19 alleles excluded top-level allele compatibility export. source-model documented scope differences, unexplained decision arithmetic. Use source tables inspect result rather treating projected label sufficient evidence:
code: SELECT d.*, s.scv_accession, s.submitter_name, s.classification,        s.review_status, s.date_last_evaluated FROM clinvar_policy_decisions d JOIN clinvar_disease_submissions s   ON s.release_id = d.release_id  AND s.vcv_accession = d.vcv_accession  AND s.allele_id = d.allele_id  AND s.disease_key = d.disease_key WHERE d.release_id = 'my-release'   AND d.vcv_accession = 'VCV000091629';

title: Semantic retrieval, DuckLake, and VariantStory
text: RClinVarbitration faster way attach aggregate label allele. VCV release contains attributable submission text, condition phenotype links, gene relations, observations, literature identifiers. relational representation makes evidence reusable : phenotype- text-driven dynamic gene-panel proposals; retrieval submission rationales literature around candidate; disease-aware review conflicting VUS assertions; prioritization novel variants gene, disease, phenotype, literature context; release--release reanalysis. Embedding similarity database neighbor must reclassify VUS novel variant. can propose candidates retrieve source evidence. Clinical evidence admission, deterministic criteria, human review remain separate steps.

title: Semantic retrieval, DuckLake, and VariantStory
text: Four views provide compact starting surfaces: complete 2026-07-02 release views expose 30,649,367 semantic text rows, including 4,213,102 comments 5,937,873 submitted descriptions; 24,178 HPO links covering 2,628 distinct terms; 8,252,297 citation/link rows. observed source counts, claims every text link independent clinically admissible. complete scan gene summary view produced 92,789 genes 20.7 seconds benchmark host. Materializing took 23.2 seconds, exact BRCA1 lookup took 3 milliseconds. Workloads repeatedly query gene summaries therefore version materialization rather recompute view every request.
code: CREATE TABLE clinvar_gene_summary_cache AS SELECT * FROM clinvar_gene_summaries;  SELECT * FROM clinvar_gene_summary_cache WHERE gene_key = 'ncbigene:672';

title: Semantic retrieval, DuckLake, and VariantStory
text: ducksemantics can store HPO ontology structure dense late-interaction embeddings DuckDB. two packages can use one connection: RClinVarbitration owns ClinVar source semantics, ducksemantics owns ontology retrieval mechanics. Select attributable bounded document collection embedding. example, comments submitted descriptions generally useful embedding every HGVS assertion-method row. dense_provider deliberately created RClinVarbitration: model, weights digest, task prompt, dimensions, privacy policy belong semantic run receipt. stored subject_id joins every hit back exact ClinVar text row. Direct HPO identifiers can join pinned HPO graph without embedding: semantic search writes registers semantic_hits(subject_id, score) relation, transparent dynamic gene-panel proposal can formed: candidate panel explicit retrieval support, validated gene-disease panel. Preserve score, source document IDs, release, model receipt, policy profile reviewers can inspect gene proposed.
code: library(ducksemantics)  # `con` is the already initialized RClinVarbitration DuckDB connection. ducksemantics_init(con)  documents <- DBI::dbGetQuery(con, "   SELECT semantic_document_id, text   FROM clinvar_semantic_documents   WHERE release_id = 'ncbi-vcv-2026-07-02'     AND section IN ('comment', 'attribute:Description')     AND length(text) >= 40 ")  vectors <- ducksemantics_embed_cached(   documents$text,   provider = dense_provider,   cache_dir = "clinvar-embedding-cache" ) ducksemantics_embedding_batch(   vectors,   subject_id = documents$semantic_document_id,   subject_kind = "clinvar_document",   provider = "embeddinggemma-clinvar-v1",   text = documents$text ) |>   ducksemantics_write_embeddings(con, replace = TRUE) SELECT h.vcv_accession, h.scv_entity_id, h.hpo_id, n.label FROM clinvar_hpo_terms h JOIN semantic_nodes n   ON n.family = 'HPO' AND n.node_id = h.hpo_id WHERE h.release_id = 'ncbi-vcv-2026-07-02'; SELECT gene_symbol,        max(h.score) AS best_text_score,        count(DISTINCT d.semantic_document_id) AS supporting_documents,        max(g.pathogenic_allele_count) AS clinvar_pathogenic_alleles FROM semantic_hits h JOIN clinvar_semantic_documents d   ON d.semantic_document_id = h.subject_id CROSS JOIN unnest(d.gene_symbols) AS genes(gene_symbol) LEFT JOIN clinvar_gene_summary_cache g   ON g.release_id = d.release_id AND g.symbol = genes.gene_symbol GROUP BY gene_symbol ORDER BY best_text_score DESC, supporting_documents DESC;

title: Semantic retrieval, DuckLake, and VariantStory
text: DuckLake useful multiple applications need immutable source releases, Parquet-backed tables, snapshot history, release--release deltas. recommended boundary : download checksum source; import local file-backed DuckDB staging database; validate row counts, release metadata, policy outputs; append typed source tables DuckLake one publication transaction; materialize derived policy tables separately policy/profile identity. use DuckLake snapshot number replacement ClinVar’s source release. Record . DuckLake snapshot says lake changed; release_id, source URL, digest, import/policy versions say published. local DuckLake attachment can created standard DuckDB SQL: first publication, create typed DuckLake table validated source relation. Later releases append rows new immutable release ID. production, execute complete table set one checked transaction record DuckLake snapshot transform receipt. Source derived relations conflated. new arbitration profile can produce new derived snapshot without pretending NCBI source changed. Conversely, new ClinVar release can invalidate affected downstream materializations. future clinDuckLake adapter can publication transaction, table manifest, snapshot receipt, release-delta API. call RClinVarbitration source parsing policy views rather implementing second ClinVar parser arbitration kernel. RClinVarbitration take hard DuckLake dependency merely support local single-release analysis.
code: metadata <- normalizePath("clinvar-metadata.ducklake", mustWork = FALSE) data_path <- normalizePath("clinvar-lake-data", mustWork = FALSE) dir.create(data_path, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)  DBI::dbExecute(con, "INSTALL ducklake") DBI::dbExecute(con, "LOAD ducklake") attach_sql <- paste(   "ATTACH",   DBI::dbQuoteString(con, paste0("ducklake:", metadata)),   "AS clinvar_lake (DATA_PATH",   DBI::dbQuoteString(con, data_path),   ")" ) DBI::dbExecute(con, attach_sql) BEGIN TRANSACTION;  CREATE TABLE clinvar_lake.main.clinvar_releases AS SELECT * FROM main.clinvar_releases WHERE release_id = 'ncbi-vcv-2026-07-02';  CREATE TABLE clinvar_lake.main.clinvar_variants AS SELECT * FROM main.clinvar_variants WHERE release_id = 'ncbi-vcv-2026-07-02';  CREATE TABLE clinvar_lake.main.clinvar_policy_decisions AS SELECT * FROM main.clinvar_policy_decisions WHERE release_id = 'ncbi-vcv-2026-07-02'   AND policy_version = 'cpg-clinvarbitration-2.2.11'   AND profile_id = 'default';  COMMIT;

title: Semantic retrieval, DuckLake, and VariantStory
text: VariantStory separates source observations, case-independent classification, case prioritization, evidence admission, review. RClinVarbitration fits release-pinned supplementary-source adapter: raw SCVs, text, HPO links, citations source observations; clinvar_policy_decisions provider- policy-scoped derived observation, native VariantStory SVC verdict; clinvar_policy_pathogenic_alleles supports named ClinVar P/LP prioritization module exact assembly/allele disease-context joins; semantic/HPO retrieval may propose gene-condition candidates literature claims, admit evidence ; DuckLake release transform receipts allow VariantStory recompute contexts affected new ClinVar release arbitration profile. VariantStory yet expose executable RClinVarbitration adapter. contract implemented tested, use relations explicit integration design, claim ClinVar evidence automatically mapped SVC criteria.

title: Semantic retrieval, DuckLake, and VariantStory
text: Talos commit dc0278df0c0af80614963444f3766e22e8124c27 (version 11.1.0) useful new pinned oracle. removes Talos’s private BCFtools fork required greedy coding/non-coding behavior upstream BCFtools 1.24, invokes bcftools csq --greedy 1 --local-csq. also introduces STRipy-derived short-tandem-repeat records separate Talos variant type. sharpens two integration boundaries: DuckHTS/VariantStory compatibility target official BCFtools 1.24 exact --greedy 1 --local-csq profile, unspecified BCFtools result former private fork. STR evidence needs callset identity, repeat-count disease-range semantics, inheritance logic, evaluation profile. ClinVar gene/HPO/text relations can support retrieval STR locus, allele-level ClinVarbitration label must silently applied repeat expansion. RClinVarbitration still supplies release-pinned ClinVar source observations; BCFtools consequence projection STR genotype interpretation. VUS novel-variant workflows, safe sequence : preserves useful discovery signal keeping source authority, model proposals, policy decisions, clinical review distinguishable.
code: case allele + consequence   -> exact ClinVar allele/disease observations   -> HPO and semantic candidate retrieval   -> attributable text and literature inspection   -> explicit evidence claims and admission   -> deterministic condition-specific evaluation   -> human review

title: Storage, caching, and full-release performance
text: RClinVarbitration uses several distinct forms reuse. Calling “cache” hides important lifecycle differences.

title: Storage, caching, and full-release performance
text: rclinvarbitration_download_clinvar() stores official NCBI files tools::R_user_dir("RClinVarbitration", "cache") default. accepts either release = "latest" specific monthly archive "2026-03". downloader fetches NCBI’s MD5 sidecar VCV XML current flat files. matching local file reused. stale corrupt file replaced complete temporary download passes checksum. NCBI publish adjacent MD5 sidecars archived flat files, validation-files reused name unless overwrite = TRUE. latest mutable remote alias. auditable run, retain returned URL MD5 assign immutable release_id; selecting explicit monthly archive preferable.
code: latest <- rclinvarbitration_download_clinvar("latest") archived <- rclinvarbitration_download_clinvar("2026-03")

title: Storage, caching, and full-release performance
text: package installation, native C source built separately every supported DuckDB version. rclinvarbitration_enable() selects artifact whose embedded DuckDB version exact PRAGMA platform value match active connection. Windows packages include windows_amd64 R-devel’s windows_amd64_mingw metadata identities Rtools/MinGW machine code DuckDB validates identity literally. package-owned compatibility material, downloaded code cache silently falls back another DuckDB ABI.

title: Storage, caching, and full-release performance
text: file-backed DuckDB database durable, queryable conversion XML. import, ordinary queries read typed relations never rescan decompress XML. Multiple release_id values may coexist one database. clinvar_releases row records completion, source path, optional source URL MD5, byte size, import time. Passing downloader’s returned vector directly lets importer retain URL digest metadata. Extracting bare character path drops R attribute; source_url source_md5 can supplied explicitly.
code: library(DBI) library(duckdb)  xml <- rclinvarbitration_download_clinvar("2026-03") db <- file.path(tools::R_user_dir("RClinVarbitration", "data"), "clinvar.duckdb") dir.create(dirname(db), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE) con <- dbConnect(duckdb(   dbdir = db,   config = list(     allow_unsigned_extensions = "true",     memory_limit = "2GB",     preserve_insertion_order = "false",     threads = "2"   ) )) rclinvarbitration_enable(con) rclinvarbitration_import_xml(con, xml, release_id = "ncbi-vcv-2026-03")

title: Storage, caching, and full-release performance
text: conversion four phases: native table function performs one forward libxml2 scan streaming gzip decompression. emits one compact JSON-backed row per selected entity. SQL projects rows typed relations without EAV pivot, XML DOM, R data-frame copy. staging relation durable DuckDB table conversion size bounded disk rather R memory. dropped projection, DuckDB keeps released blocks inside database file reuse. Therefore physical file records import high-water mark can substantially larger currently used blocks. reusable database capacity, second live copy XML import. Configure database DuckDB temp_directory storage substantial headroom. smallest possible single-release artifact matters fast reuse, publish selected relations fresh DuckDB database, Parquet, DuckLake validation; compaction/publication time separate import benchmark . Public relations commit independently one enormous transaction held complete release. release-catalogue marker inserted projections succeed. R error removes partial rows drops staging. process killed abruptly cleanup run, completion marker exists; later import drops stale staging clears partial rows release_id writing release . replace = TRUE stages validates XML scan deleting existing release. scan failure therefore leaves previous complete release intact. later projection failure cleaned restore replaced rows, production publication use new immutable release ID switch consumers success.
code: XML.GZ forward scan   -> temporary compact entity relation   -> typed public relations   -> clinvar_releases completion marker   -> temporary relation dropped

title: Storage, caching, and full-release performance
text: Views clinvar_disease_submissions, clinvar_policy_decisions, clinvar_gene_summaries, clinvar_semantic_documents SQL definitions, automatically refreshed materialized caches. DuckDB plans stored source relations query. repeated delivery workloads, explicitly materialize release- policy-versioned result Parquet, DuckDB table, DuckLake. replace auditable source tables final classification label. package deliberately avoids ART indexes release-scale tables. build maintenance memory cost undesirable ingestion; analytical filters, scans, joins, Parquet statistics, downstream materializations intended execution path. DuckDB’s buffer manager may retain recently read blocks process memory spill intermediates temp_directory. runtime buffer cache managed DuckDB disappears process exits. different durable database NCBI download cache.

title: Storage, caching, and full-release performance
text: complete NCBI VCV release measured, rather extrapolated one-record fixture. committed machine-readable receipt inst/benchmarks/full-release-2026-07-02.dcf, tools/benchmark_full_release.R reproduces measurement. run used DuckDB 1.5.3 Linux, Intel Core i5-13500, two DuckDB threads, 2 GB DuckDB memory limit, preserve_insertion_order = false. DuckDB memory limit process RSS limit: native parser, compression, allocator, process memory remain outside configured buffer budget. timed scope rclinvarbitration_import_xml() . Connection creation, extension loading, schema initialization, final CHECKPOINT, process startup excluded. complete process including operations took 21 minutes 53.3 seconds. final checkpoint, 29,874 91,471 256-KiB blocks used 61,597 free. Thus 22.33-GiB physical file contained 7.29 GiB live blocks 15.04 GiB reserved reuse staging dropped. Report physical file size disk planning; report used/free blocks well explaining logical storage. Runtime compression vary DuckDB version, CPU, storage, filesystem cache, configuration; result observed reference, universal guarantee. Run benchmark : Use /usr/bin/time -v platform equivalent around command operating-system peak-RSS measurement required.
code: CLINVAR_DUCKDB_MEMORY_LIMIT=2GB \ CLINVAR_DUCKDB_THREADS=2 \ Rscript tools/benchmark_full_release.R \   ClinVarVCVRelease_2026-03.xml.gz \   clinvar-2026-03.duckdb \   ncbi-vcv-2026-03 \   clinvar-2026-03-benchmark.dcf

what: Stream ClinVar XML into Relational DuckDB Tables
title: Stream ClinVar XML into Relational DuckDB Tables
text: RClinVarbitration streams official ClinVar VCV XML/XML.GZ releases relational DuckDB tables derives ClinVarbitration-style decisions retained SCV submissions. import single forward scan: load XML release R data frame -memory XML tree. package bundles exact-version DuckDB extensions DuckDB v1.5.0 v1.5.4. Connections must allow locally built unsigned extensions.

title: Stream ClinVar XML into Relational DuckDB Tables
text: Native builds support Linux, macOS, x86-64 Windows. Linux macOS require libxml2, zlib, pkg-config, C compiler. Windows, install current Rtools release; target-aware pkg-config supplies static libxml2 zlib dependencies. webR supported separately tested Emscripten build.
code: install.packages(   "RClinVarbitration",   repos = c(     rgenomicsetl = "https://rgenomicsetl.r-universe.dev",     CRAN = "https://cloud.r-project.org"   ) )

title: Stream ClinVar XML into Relational DuckDB Tables
text: complete current archived release, use checksum-validating download cache file-backed database: main query surfaces : Read arbitration algorithm, storage caching guide, semantic/DuckLake/VariantStory integration. deviation differential audit records known differences upstream ClinVarbitration ClinVar. measured complete 2026-07-02 release (5.42 GiB compressed XML) imported 21 minutes 52.5 seconds produced 22.33-GiB physical DuckDB file. storage guide reports hardware, row counts, peak memory, used/free block split behind physical high-water size.
code: library(DBI) library(duckdb) library(RClinVarbitration)  con <- dbConnect(duckdb(config = list(allow_unsigned_extensions = "true")))  rclinvarbitration_enable(con) rclinvarbitration_init(con)  # Replace this bundled one-record fixture with a complete VCV XML/XML.GZ file. xml <- system.file(   "extdata", "VCV_XML_VCV000091629.xml.gz",   package = "RClinVarbitration" ) imported <- rclinvarbitration_import_xml(   con, xml, release_id = "clinvar-example" )  dbGetQuery(con, "   SELECT vcv_accession, variation_id, aggregate_classification   FROM clinvar_variants ") ##   vcv_accession variation_id     aggregate_classification ## 1  VCV000091629        91629 Pathogenic/Likely pathogenic release <- "2026-03" xml <- rclinvarbitration_download_clinvar(release) # `"latest"` is also accepted, but assign its resolved content an immutable ID.  full_con <- dbConnect(duckdb(   dbdir = "clinvar.duckdb",   config = list(     allow_unsigned_extensions = "true",     memory_limit = "2GB",     preserve_insertion_order = "false",     threads = "2"   ) )) rclinvarbitration_enable(full_con) rclinvarbitration_import_xml(   full_con, xml, release_id = paste0("ncbi-vcv-", release) )

Input, code, configuration, output digests oracle manifest. independently matched XML/flat audit classified every one 16 shared value differences 361 key-set differences source-row receipts. come NCBI flat rows whose classification - XML carries current classification; remainder one duplicate-SCV identity case, five source vocabulary differences, two nested compound alleles. ERRATA audit contains full counts receipts. published Zenodo release 16,865 reference-keys used unpinned source snapshot; exact-input conformance result. One deliberate edge-case difference RClinVarbitration applies qualified Illumina benign exclusion declared upstream. pinned commit, Python implementation’s inner-loop continue actually remove submission, compatibility follows documented policy rather implementation accident.

what: Export an allele-level ClinVarbitration-compatible Parquet file — rclinvarbitration_export_clinvarbitration_parquet
title: Export an allele-level ClinVarbitration-compatible Parquet file — rclinvarbitration_export_clinvarbitration_parquet
text: Writes seven columns Centre Population Genomics ClinVarbitration's clinvar_decisions.tsv: contig, position, reference, alternate, clinical_significance, gold_stars, allele_id. source package's allele-level policy view, disease-level decision view, output row usable locus/alleles annotation record. GRCh37 GRCh38 supported. output retains every qualifying source locus, including distinct X/Y locations one AlleleID.

title: ClinVarbitration policy SQL — rclinvarbitration_policy_sql
text: Returns DuckDB views implementing supported policy clinvar_disease_submissions. policy bins submitted classifications, excludes unknown bins applies upstream policy's intended qualified Illumina benign exclusion, optionally applies profile-specific submitter exclusions, prefers evidence evaluated 2016 onward always retaining expert-panel practice guideline evidence, applies 60/20 majority rule. disease-level allele-level views reproduce upstream strong-review rule: first retained practice-guideline expert-panel classification source order decisive.

title: ClinVar relational schema SQL — rclinvarbitration_schema_sql
text: Returns DuckDB DDL focused ClinVar schema. Public identifiers domain relations retained directly: VCV variants, alleles assembly locations, genes, RCV aggregates, SCV submissions, conditions, observations, citations, attributes, attributable discovery text. XML parser nodes persisted. release catalogue enforces small primary key; release-scale analytical tables expose logical key columns without DuckDB ART indexes complete imports remain memory-bounded.

title: RClinVarbitration 0.1.1
text: Add submitter_exclusions XML-derived Parquet exporter. Direct exclusions normalized case-insensitively, combined selected named profile, applied without deleting imported source submissions. Replace full-release executable README concise quick start explicit comparison upstream ClinVarbitration. Add native x86-64 Windows extension builds using Rtools-provided libxml2, zlib, target-aware pkg-config; retain Linux, macOS, webR builds. Runtime artifact selection now matches exact DuckDB platform metadata includes windows_amd64 R-devel’s windows_amd64_mingw identities. Add rclinvarbitration_download_clinvar() checksum-validated current monthly archived VCV XML downloads optional flat-file validation inputs. Download URL, digest, source byte size can flow release catalogue. Add clinvar_hpo_terms, clinvar_literature_links, clinvar_semantic_documents, disease-aware clinvar_gene_summaries semantic retrieval, gene panels, literature review, DuckLake publication, VariantStory integration. Add pkgdown vignettes complete arbitration algorithm, storage/cache lifecycle measured full-release performance, semantic/DuckLake/ VariantStory integration. Add rendered docs/ERRATA.md audit intentional deviations observed XML/flat/upstream differentials. Execute pinned upstream TSV algorithm exact March 2026 flat inputs: 4,125,389 keys values match package reproducer. Classify 377 XML/flat key value differences source-row receipts, quantify sample/method/observed-data/consequence XML structure coverage. Add release-differential tests disease keys, SCV replacement, withdrawn assertions, compound alleles, mitochondrial locations, plus curated real HPO PubMed context projections. Add experimental webR/WebAssembly support. package now builds version-matched DuckDB extension Emscripten side module browser smoke test loads imports compressed VCV fixture. Project compact parser rows package-owned rclinvar_json_field() scalar rather DuckDB’s separately downloadable JSON extension. Imports now require extension download, including browser/webR runtimes. Remove premature local v1 policy suffix; preserve pinned cpg-clinvarbitration-2.2.11 identifier, source-order strong-review rule, separate disease- allele-level decision views. Add Parquet exporters VCV-derived allele policy direct, SQL-reproduction ClinVarbitration versioned NCBI flat-file archives, plus retained differential script published Zenodo releases. Retain imported SCV source order deterministic strong-review decisions. Bundle exact C_STRUCT_UNSTABLE extension artifacts DuckDB v1.5.0 v1.5.4, selected enabled connection’s engine version. Replace generic XML node/edge/statement persistence one-pass, ClinVar-specific entity scan focused VCV, allele, location, gene, RCV, SCV, condition, observation, citation, attribute, evidence-text relations. Staging now stores one JSON-backed row per selected entity requires release-wide EAV grouping. Release-scale tables use logical keys without memory-resident ART indexes, projection commits separately; release catalogue marks completion failed imports clean partial rows. Add clinvar_disease_aggregates clinvar_disease_submissions direct RCV- SCV-level disease-policy inputs, canonical disease identifiers selected independently complete retained cross-reference relation. Add cpg-clinvarbitration-2.2.11 SQL policy, configurable submitter-blinding profiles, clinvar_policy_pathogenic_alleles disease-specific P/LP join surface Rduckhts/DuckHTS. Execute README quick start bundled real VCV fixture. separately receipted full-release benchmark remains file-backed rerun README rendering.

title: RClinVarbitration 0.1.0
text: First public release. Added package-owned DuckDB C extension clinvar_xml_statements(path), single-threaded libxml2 forward scan ClinVar VCV XML XML.GZ releases. Added semantic SQL materialization ordered XML nodes, edges, literals, discovery text, real NCBI VCV XML.GZ fixture. first artifact supports exactly DuckDB v1.5.3 Unix-like hosts; fails closed engine versions.
